name: frSetTrigger
title: frSetTrigger
syntax: long frSetTrigger( long channel, long portNo )
description: This function activates the Trigger output of the selected VN interface. The VN interfaces provide three different trigger ports. The ports can be set separately.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: FlexRay channel (cluster number). The channel number identifies the VN interfaces in case several interfaces are active.
